name: Elemental HERO Neo Bubbleman
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｅ・ＨＥＲＯ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>エレメンタルヒーロー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> バブルマン・ネオ
desc: This card cannot be Normal Summoned or Set. This card cannot be Special Summoned except by sending an "Elemental Hero Bubbleman" you control and "Metamorphosis" in your hand to the Graveyard. This card's name is treated as "Elemental Hero Bubbleman" while it is face-up on the field. Destroy an opponent's monster that battles this card at the end of the Damage Step.
mnst_eff: This card cannot be Normal Summoned or Set. This card cannot be Special Summoned except by sending an "Elemental Hero Bubbleman" you control and "Metamorphosis" in your hand to the Graveyard. This card's name is treated as "Elemental Hero Bubbleman" while it is face-up on the field. Destroy an opponent's monster that battles this card at the end of the Damage Step.

eff_types: Summoning condition, Summoning condition, Continuous, Trigger
action: Sends from your field to your Graveyard
Sends from your hand to your Graveyard
stat_change: Changes own name while on the field
mst: Destroys battling monster after damage calculation
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
